keyPoints: E-Waste is defined as waste generated at the end of the product life cycle and includes electrical and electronic equipment, such as computers, mobile phones, televisions, and other electronic devices
The E-Waste (Management) Amendment Rules, 2023, 2024 regulate the export of e-waste and require manufacturers to take responsibility for the waste generated by their products
The rules also emphasize the importance of recycling and reusing e-waste materials, and provide guidelines for the collection and disposal of hazardous waste
